mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_safety_hazard_form ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_safety_hazard_form (title, description, division_name, department_name, evaluator, survey_date, team_members, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{divisionName}, #{departmentName}, #{evaluator}, #{surveyDate}, #{teamMembers}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedByName}, #{modifiedByTeam}, #{modifiedByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_safety_hazard_form SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, division_name = #{divisionName}, department_name = #{departmentName}, evaluator = #{evaluator}, survey_date = #{surveyDate}, team_members = #{teamMembers}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_by_team = #{modifiedByTeam}, modified_by_position = #{modifiedByPosition}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_safety_hazard_item WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_safety_hazard_item (form_id, process_activity, machine_name, machine_qty, chemical_name, chemical_qty, exposure_time, worker_comp_1, worker_comp_2, worker_comp_3, worker_comp_4, worker_comp_5, worker_comp_6, shift_work_1, shift_work_2, shift_work_3, heavy_load_1, heavy_load_2, heavy_load_3, permit_work, special_training, sort_order, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{formId}, #{processActivity}, #{machineName}, #{machineQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{chemicalName}, #{chemicalQty}, #{exposureTime}, #{workerComp1}, #{workerComp2}, #{workerComp3}, #{workerComp4}, #{workerComp5}, #{workerComp6}, #{shiftWork1}, #{shiftWork2}, #{shiftWork3}, #{heavyLoad1}, #{heavyLoad2}, #{heavyLoad3}, #{permitWork}, #{specialTraining}, #{sortOrder}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
